zh.Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Talbot於1392年出生在英國史洛普爾其其時，她的父親Sir Richard Talbot31歲，母親Ankaret le Strange31歲。她於1413年與Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1441年1月16日在英國享年49歲。

zh-hans.Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England: 英国諾廷加姆爾沃可索普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Talbot于1392年出生在英国史洛普爾其其时，她的父亲Sir Richard Talbot31岁，母亲Ankaret le Strange31岁。她于1413年与Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1441年1月16日在英国享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Talbot was born in 1392, in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Talbot, was 31 and her mother, Ankaret le Strange, was 31. She married Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon in 1413, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 16 January 1441, in England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Talbot est née en 1392, à Whitchurch, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Talbot, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ankaret le Strange, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon en 1413, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 16 janvier 1441, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Talbot 1392 in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Talbot 31 und ihre Mutter Ankaret le Strange 31. Sie hat 1413 in England Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 16. Januar 1441 im Alter von 49 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Talbot è nata il nel 1392 nel Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Talbot, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Ankaret le Strange, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon nel 1413, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 16 gennaio 1441, nel England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Talbotが1392年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィトチャーチで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Talbotは31歳，母Ankaret le Strangeは31歳であった。1413年にイギリスでHugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1441年1月16日にイギリスで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Talbot(이)가 1392년 영국 슈럽실르 휘트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Talbot(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ankaret le Strange(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1413년 영국에서 Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 1월 16일 영국에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Talbot nasceu em 1392, em Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Talbot, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Ankaret le Strange, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon em 1413, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1441, em Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Talbot родилась в 1392 г. в местности уичурч, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Talbot было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ankaret le Strange, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon в 1413 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 16 января 1441 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Talbot nació en 1392, en Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Talbot, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Ankaret le Strange, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon en 1413, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 16 de enero de 1441, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
